name: Criteo Commerce Growth API
what_it_does: Criteo Commerce Growth REST API for retail media and commerce performance advertising platform. Enables AI agents to manage retargeting and performance campaign creation and budget management, handle retail media network ad campaign management for brand advertising on retailer inventory, access campaign performance reporting and ROAS analytics for optimization, retrieve audience and segment management for retargeting and prospecting, manage product catalog feed integration for dynamic creative optimization, handle bid strategy configuration for CPC, CPA, and ROAS targets, access retailer audience and shopper data for commerce media activation, retrieve attribution and measurement data for cross-channel ROI, manage brand campaign creation on retailer inventory (retail media), and integrate Criteo commerce data with Google Analytics, Salesforce, and retail analytics platforms.
use_cases: Managing retargeting campaigns from e-commerce advertising agents
Optimizing retail media budgets from brand advertising agents
Reporting on ROAS from performance marketing agents
Managing product catalog feeds from commerce media agents
not_for: Brand awareness without performance advertising and ROAS measurement focus
Non-commerce advertising without retail and e-commerce context
Publisher inventory management without advertiser-side campaign management
best_when: A retailer or brand using Criteo wants AI agents to automate retargeting campaign management, retail media activation, product feed optimization, ROAS reporting, and performance advertising integration.
avoid_when: BUDGET RISK: Automated bid and budget automation can significantly increase ad spend — implement spend caps before enabling automated optimization. Criteo's audience data relies on cookie and retail signal data; privacy regulation changes (cookie deprecation) affect targeting accuracy. Retail media attribution is complex; understand attribution windows before making budget decisions.

auth.notes: Criteo uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials. Access token per advertiser with application-level auth. SDKs in Python, Java, PHP, JS, C# on GitHub. Developer portal at developers.criteo.com with OpenAPI spec. No native webhooks — polling-based report retrieval. Retail media API for brand-retailer collaboration. Commerce Grid API for programmatic inventory access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free for Criteo advertising clients; production requires account
pricing.paid_tiers: CPC, CPA, or ROAS-target bidding; minimum spend thresholds for retail media
pricing.notes: Paris, France. Founded 2005. Public company (CRTO, NASDAQ). Performance advertising and retail media market. $2.1B+ revenue (2023). 22,000+ advertisers. 225 retail media partners (Walmart, Target, Best Buy). Commerce Grid SSP for publishers. Open Internet advertising focus. Competes with Amazon Advertising and The Trade Desk for retail media and performance advertising.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: BUDGET RISK: Automated bid optimization can significantly increase ad spend; set campaign-level budget caps before enabling automated bid adjustments
Cookie deprecation impact — Criteo's retargeting relies heavily on browser cookies; Safari ITP and Chrome Privacy Sandbox changes affect audience match rates
Retail media vs. performance — Criteo has separate APIs for performance (retargeting) and retail media (brand on retailer inventory); verify which API applies to your use case
Async report retrieval — performance reports are async (request → poll → download); build polling logic with appropriate retry intervals
Product catalog sync — dynamic creative requires real-time product catalog feed; implement automated catalog refresh for accurate product data in ads
Multi-advertiser management — agencies managing multiple advertisers need per-advertiser token management; implement token refresh automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Performance advertising and retail media. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA, IAB TCF. OAuth2. EU/US. Campaign, audience, and attribution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Advertising platform. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2. EU/US. Campaign and audience data.
